characters_found.name: hadji_murad
actions: rides as a fugitive with only one murid, wrapped in hood and burka
has a rifle protruding from under burka
peers with quick black eyes into faces of those he meets
turns left into narrow side street instead of main road
stops at second saklya and looks around
touches sleeping old man with handle of leather-plaited whip and clicks tongue
uncovers his face after greeting
dismounts and walks with a slight limp
enters under the penthouse
inner_states: trying to attract as little attention as possible
alert and watchful — peering into faces of those he meets
social_markers: Shamil's naib (lieutenant/governor)
famous for his exploits
normally rides with banner and dozens of murids
currently a fugitive — reduced to one murid
Chechen/Avar warrior elite
uses customary Islamic greeting 'Selaam aleikum'
carries leather-plaited whip — marker of rank

relationship_dynamics.quality: recognized and welcomed; uses customary greeting, uncovers face only after greeting
commands loyalty; murid quickly takes over from old man without being ordered verbally

new_info: has a slight limp when walking
travels disguised — no banner, no escort, contrary to his normal mode of travel
knows this village and specific saklya — goes directly to side street and second house

quickly dismounts before old man can help
motions old man aside and takes his place at Hadji Murad's stirrup
social_markers: murid — religious/military follower
strong and active
protective role, acts as bodyguard/attendant

new_info: sole remaining companion of Hadji Murad in his fugitive state
physically strong and quick — described as 'strong active murid'

characters_found.name: old_man_(unnamed_host)
direct_quotes: run to the mosque and call your father
speech_descriptors: mumbling with toothless mouth while descending ladder
orders boy to call his father
actions: lies on roof of saklya covered with sheepskin
rises when touched with whip
blinks to unstick moist red eyelids
responds to greeting with smile
raises himself on thin legs
thrusts feet into wooden-heeled slippers
slips arms into crumpled sheepskin
descends ladder backwards while dressing
shakes head and mumbles while climbing down
reaches ground and hospitably seizes Hadji Murad's bridle and right stirrup
is motioned aside by murid
hurries forward to open the thin, creaking door into the saklya
inner_states: recognizes Hadji Murad and smiles — implicit familiarity and welcome
social_markers: old, physically frail — thin legs, shrivelled sunburnt neck, toothless, no eyelashes
wears greasy old beshmet and nightcap — lower class, poor material goods
resting on roof during day — rural Chechen peasant lifestyle
wooden-heeled slippers — regional Caucasian footwear
hospitable by reflex — grabs bridle and stirrup immediately
patriarch of household — commands boy directly

relationship_dynamics.quality: recognizes him without hesitation; welcomes him hospitably; defers to him socially

has a son (called from mosque) and a boy (grandson or son) in household

meets Hadji Murad
fixes sparkling eyes wonderingly on the new arrivals

eyes described as black as ripe sloes — Caucasian physical type
member of rural Chechen household

relationship_dynamics.quality: obedient; old man commands him immediately
stares in wonder — does not know him personally but reacts to his presence

bends nearly double to begin arranging cushions (for guests)

moves through inner door — domestic space, segregated from outer entry
